title: My Greatest Escape
subTitle: Former thief and gangster Michel Vaujour has spent 27 years behind bars, and 17 of them in solitary confinement. Longing for freedom, he has made five spectacular escapes. While this tumultuous lifestyle has often exposed him to the worst situations, it has also forced him to confront himself face-to-face.
